items.title: Amazon and Best Buy Mario Day 2026 digital Switch game sale now live from $6
items.summary:
Nintendo has now officially announced its Mario Day 2026 plans and has already launched this year’s official eShop sale. However, Amazon and Best Buy have now launched Mario Day 2026 Switch game deals and you’ll now find a selection of first-party Nintendo titles marked down in digital form. There will still be a collection of physical games deals going live at Best Buy and elsewhere this weekend (March 8 at most retailers online), but the digital offers are already live:

  • Luigi’s Mansion 3 $40 (Reg. $60)
  • Super Mario 3D World + Bowser’s Fury$40 (Reg. $60)
  • Donkey Kong Country Returns HD $42 (Reg. $60)
  • Super Mario Maker 2 $40 (Reg. $60)
  • Super Mario RPG $42 (Reg. $60)
  • MARIO + RABBIDS SPARKS OF HOPE $6 (Reg. $60)
  • Super Mario Party Jamboree $42 (Reg. $60)
  • Super Mario Party Jamboree (Switch 2 Edition on eShop) $62 (Reg. $80)
  • Mario vs. Donkey Kong $40 (Reg. $50)
  • And even more…

Mario Day 2026 hub: New games, special Switch 2 console bundle, deals, more

items.title: Razer’s latest Kishi V3 Pro USB-C controller grip for Android and iPhone/iPad just hit a new $120 all-time low
items.summary:
We are now tracking a deal at Amazon that drops Razer’s Kishi V3 Pro USB-C game controller grip down to $119.99 shipped. This particular model hit the scene last year carrying a $150 price tag as part of the brand’s Kishi V3 controller lineup. It has only been discounted once before today, when it hit $133 during the Black Friday sale last year, and today’s deal lands it $13 below that price. This is the lowest price we have tracked for this controller that is compatible with Android, iPhones, and the iPad mini, and you can learn more about it below.

items.title: Lenovo’s AMD-powered IdeaPad Pro 5 OLED Copilot+ PCs with RTX 5050 GPU now starts from $750 (All-time low)
items.summary:
Over at Lenovo, you’ll find its IdeaPad Pro 5 AMD-powered OLED Copilot+ PC with 16GB RAM and 512GB SSD currently going for $749.99 shipped. Don’t forget to enter promo code LENOVOLOVE2 during checkout to see the discounted price. This particular notebook typically goes for up to $1,300 at Amazon, where it’s currently fetching close to $1,000, with some third-party listings dipping below that mark. Today’s deal at Lenovo, however, shaves $250 off its usual going rate to mark the lowest price we have tracked for this config with a Ryzen AI 5 340 processor to date. You’ll also find the variant of this laptop with the more powerful Ryzen AI 7 350 going for $930 low at Woot right now, which also happens to be the lowest we have tracked for it to date. Both of these laptops pack an RTX 5050 GPU to enable some light gaming and handle content creation workloads, and you can learn more about them below.

What we love

Sources: OpenAI employees claim the DOD tested Microsoft's Azure version of OpenAI models before OpenAI lifted its blanket ban on military use in January 2024  —  Sources allege the Defense Department experimented with Microsoft's version of OpenAI technology before the ChatGPT-maker lifted its prohibition on military applications.
